diagrams.title: 5-Stage RISC Pipeline Timing
diagrams.description: Shows how 5 instructions flow through IF, ID, EX, MEM, WB stages over clock cycles
diagrams.purpose: Understand pipeline operation and instruction overlap

diagrams.title: Pipeline Speedup vs Instruction Count
diagrams.description: Graph showing speedup factor approaching k (number of stages) as n increases
elements: Curve approaching horizontal asymptote at k
diagrams.purpose: Visualize relationship between program size and pipeline efficiency

diagrams.title: Data Hazard Detection
diagrams.description: Three types of data hazards shown with instruction sequences and dependency arrows
elements: Dependency arrows showing RAW, WAR, WAW
diagrams.purpose: Identify and understand data dependencies in pipeline

diagrams.title: Branch Penalty Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows pipeline flush on branch misprediction with cycles wasted
diagrams.purpose: Understand impact of control hazards on performance
